title: Props

questions.explanation: Destructure props to grab named values.

questions.explanation: React re-renders when the PARENT changes them.
children is the special prop for JSX passed between tags.
Modern React: destructure with defaults. (Class defaultProps is legacy.)

questions.prompt: Passing all props to a child:
questions.explanation: Spread — but be careful about leaking props to DOM elements.

options: Both onClick and disabled reach the button
questions.explanation: Spread forwards everything. Handy for custom wrappers.
